new_value: {"description":"As a user on mobile I should be prompted when opening the app to review at risk items BAD, OLD, going to be OLD in the next 3 days via an attractive and intuitive card swiping system similar to how Tinder lets you review and take actions on profiles in a swipable card stack. This should only trigger once per day and should be focused with asking a user if they finished an item, and if not how much is left or did they throw it away, similar to the update item form. We want to streamline the item review/updating process. Implementation plan: AT_RISK_REVIEW_PLAN.md"}
